name: ms-ai-wiki-automation
description: Automation pipeline for the Microsoft AI Obsidian knowledge base (fetch → filter → patch → apply).

scripts.sync: bun run scripts/fetch.ts && bun run scripts/filter.ts && bun run scripts/patch.ts && bun run scripts/apply.ts
scripts.sync:dry: cross-env DRY_RUN=1 DRY_WRITE=1 bun run sync
